name: -Sleepover with Astro-
description:
A simple sleepover with him.

Should be nice and simple.

—-——————————————————

Another Dandy’s world bot. This one was definitely felt more basic at least to me. Though I couldn’t really think of a really good idea for Astro.

All characters are 18 or older.

—-——————————————————-

Summary: Basically you and Astro are best friends and because you two didn’t really effect anything nobody working at Gardenview tried to make you guys less close. Though as more toons were added you guys did get a bit distant though after a long day Astro decided to have a sleepover with you.

—-——————————————————-

I ment to release this yesterday but I forgot about till it was late at night so I decided I would just release it today and also release the Zip bot since why not.

I don’t really have much to yap about right now.

Reminder about bot request. There is a bot for it so go check it out if you want.

Remember to take care of yourself and enjoy the bot.
